English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Press and Comstock Publishing Company records
Cornell University Press
Fuertes, Louis Agassiz, 1874-1927.
35-6-257
12 cubic feet. 12 cubic feet.
[ca. 1880-1935] Correspondence, manuscripts, proofs, and illustrative material. Correspondence, manuscripts, proofs, and illustrative material pertaining to books published by the Cornell University Press and the Comstock Publishing Company; correspondence pertaining to a merger of the Nature Study Review and Nature Magazine; and correspondence pertaining to John W. ("Uncle John") Spencer's stories and letters for children on nature study and rural life; correspondents include Anna Botsford Comstock, Mary Eleanor Davis, Paul S. Galtsoff, Albert H. Hartzell, Frank E. Lutz, James G. Needham, Arthur Newton Pack, Cuthbert W. Pound, Percival S. Ridsdale, John W. Spencer, and Paul S. Welch. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 23 22 ======= 23 22 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2085780
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, October 2002
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, April 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, manuscripts, proofs, and illustrative material pertaining to books published by the Cornell University Press and the Comstock Publishing Company; correspondence pertaining to a merger of the Nature Study Review and Nature Magazine; and correspondence pertaining to John W. ("Uncle John") Spencer's stories and letters for children on nature study and rural life; correspondents include Anna Botsford Comstock, Mary Eleanor Davis, Paul S. Galtsoff, Albert H. Hartzell, Frank E. Lutz, James G. Needham, Arthur Newton Pack, Cuthbert W. Pound, Percival S. Ridsdale, John W. Spencer, and Paul S. Welch.
Cite As:
Cornell University Press and Comstock Publishing Company records, #35-6-257. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Children -- Books and reading. Country life. Nature stories. Natural history literature. Natural history -- Study and teaching. Publishers and publishing -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. University presses -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Nature magazine. Nature study review. Comstock, Anna Botsford, 1854-1930. Davis, Mary Eleanor, 1910-1968. Galtsoff, Paul S. (Paul Simon), 1887-1979. Hartzell, Albert H. Lutz, Frank Eugene, 1879-1943. Needham, James G. (James George), 1868-1957. Pack, Arthur Newton, 1893-1975. Pound, Cuthbert W. (Cuthbert Winfred), 1864-1935. Ridsdale, Percival Sheldon. Spencer, John W. Welch, Paul Smith, 1882- Comstock Publishing Company

Scope and Contents
Six 30cm 78 rpm discs.Kellogg, P.P.Allen, A.A.An Introduction to Entomology, Pt. II, first copy8Proofs of Engravings for "Daniel's Book"9Three 4" boxes of letters, one dated, two undated: Comstock correspondence concerning "Nature" magazine; "Uncle John" letters; Jack and Jill stories for publication in monthly Grange Review10Three 4" boxes of letters, one dated, two undated: Comstock correspondence concerning "Nature" magazine; "Uncle John" letters; Jack and Jill stories for publication in monthly Grange Review11Three 4" boxes of letters, one dated, two undated: Comstock correspondence concerning "Nature" magazine; "Uncle John" letters; Jack and Jill stories for publication in monthly Grange Review12Wooden cases of slides13Wooden cases of slides14Wooden cases of slides15Wooden cases of slides16Wooden cases of slides17Wooden cases of slides18Wooden cases of slides19Wooden cases of slides20Wooden cases of slides21Cornell University Press webcrawl
